untranslatable_reason: Pattern requires detection of specific multi-candle shoulder-head-shoulder formation with asymmetric volume distribution and neckline throwback confirmation—these structural elements cannot be fully expressed with single-bar or simple MA-based indicators. The 'shoulders and head formation visible together' and 'gentle rounding turn' require pattern recognition beyond available indicator set. Conversion uses proxies for reversal context (price near lows, higher volume, above MA) but does not capture the geometric head-and-shoulders structure itself.
